summary: Added AbortController-based timeout handling to TodaysEvents and LogoMarquee so long-running fetches fail instead of hanging indefinitely, allowing the existing error and fallback behavior to run.
notes: TodaysEvents now uses a 12s AbortController timeout and LogoMarquee uses a 10s AbortController timeout. Existing catch/fallback behavior now runs on timeout. No production UI copy or unrelated behavior was changed.
